name: Garlic Soup I
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a skillet until it stops foaming.
2. Add 1 tablespoon olive oil to the melted butter.
3. Add garlic and sliced onions; sauté until limp but not browned.
4. Add herbs, if desired.
5. Heat chicken broth (no bouillon) in a separate pot.
6. Toss in 10-20 cardamom pods.
7. Add the sautéed garlic and onion to the broth.
8. Deglaze with a small amount of broth, then simmer for about half an hour.
9. Remove onions and garlic; press through a strainer (or food processor) back into the broth.
10. Whisk 1 tablespoon olive oil into egg yolks, adding some hot broth first.
11. Add lime juice.
12. Whisk a little water into egg whites.
13. Just before serving, gently stir the broth and quickly add the egg whites in a thin stream.
